title: MonSanctuary Solo/Essential Official Modpack
description:
This is a modpack made for solo players or essential users.

While featuring Cobblemon mods along with quality of life enhancements for an improved gameplay experience.
body:
![Lettering that spells out "Cobblemon Sanctuary" with three pokemon around the image being Munchlax, Snorlax and Eevee](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b18c274a042daf737d8fc99df44e304b8526b53.png)Welcome to Cobblemon Sanctuary, an enchanting Minecraft modpack tailored for those who dream of blending the thrill of Pokémon adventures with the immersive world of Minecraft. Ideal for players seeking an enriched gaming experience filled with exploration, creativity, and community!



Dive into a sanctuary where Pokémon meet Minecraft in a harmonious blend of fun, adventure, and companionship. Our MonSanctuary Modpack is combined curated to provide a seamless experience, enhancing both the aesthetics and mechanics of your gameplay.

# Key Features:
Cobblemon Integration: Step into a world where Cobblemon roam free! Capture, train, and battle your way through a landscape teeming with your favorite Pokémon, enhanced with unique abilities and interactions.
![5 friends riding on a wailord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6490133c0af54b2b0388d6b23344e5023792078a_0.webp)
Quality of Life Enhancements: With mods like Inventory Tweaks, REI (Roughly Enough Items), and Xaero's Minimap, navigating and managing your resources has never been easier.

Stunning Visuals: Transform your Minecraft experience with Iris for enhanced graphics, dynamic lights, and smoother performance. Explore biomes that are brought to life with vibrant textures and immersive environments.

Crafting and Building: Expand your crafting possibilities with mods like More Decore and Farmers Delight, allowing for more intricate designs and efficient builds.

Community and Multiplayer: Designed to foster a vibrant community, our server setup ensures smooth multiplayer interactions with essential mods and seamless performance.

## Included Mods:
Some highlighted mods in the Cobblemon Sanctuary Modpack include:

Cobblemon: The Main attraction to this modpack.

Farmers Delight: Adds new crops, cooking recipes, and kitchen tools for the aspiring in-game chef.

Xaero's Minimap: A real-time map that tracks your movements and helps you navigate your world.

Iris: Enhances your game’s performance and visual quality.

EMI: Simplifies crafting with an easy-to-use item and recipe viewer.
and MANY more!!

AllTheMons x MegaShowdown: The "AllTheMons x MegaShowdown" datapack is a collaborative effort to integrate numerous Pokémon into the Cobblemon mod for Minecraft. It combines multiple addons, ensuring compatibility and preventing bugs or crashes. It includes features like automated Discord commands for Pokémon details, active support for installation and troubleshooting, and contributions from various creators.
![A player flying on top of a cobblemon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8944b749fb5db09a1bd41c887dc5988e319209ac.png)

Simple TM's: Getting moves for your pokemon has never been easier.... okay maybe a bit easier now with this simple TM's and TR's mod that allows you to copy moves or find them in loot just so you and your team can have that very specific and maybe very sweaty move set.

WonderTrade: Ever wanted to just gamble your living breathing pokemon away, WELL NOW YOU CAN (sadly) you can just trade away your useless or even throw away mons for maybe something even more useless, or something amazing... like magikarp.

### Tags

Cobblemon

Pokémon

Quality of Life

Adventure

Exploration
